    return 1 if n <= 1 else n * factorial(n - 1)

def timer(func):
    import time
    def wrapper(*args, **kwargs):
        start = time.time()
        result = func(*args, **kwargs)
        print(f'Elapsed: {time.time() - start:.4f}s')
        return result
    return wrapper

SELECT name, age
FROM users
WHERE active = 1
ORDER BY age DESC;

SELECT *
FROM orders
WHERE created_at BETWEEN '2024-01-01' AND '2024-12-31'
AND status = 'completed'
LIMIT 100;

SELECT u.name, o.amount
FROM users u
INNER JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id
WHERE o.amount > 100;

SELECT u.name, COUNT(o.id) AS order_count
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id
GROUP BY u.id, u.name;

SELECT a.name, b.name, r.relationship
FROM users a
JOIN relationships r ON a.id = r.user_a
JOIN users b ON b.id = r.user_b;

SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    AVG(salary) AS avg_salary,
    MAX(salary) AS max_salary
FROM employees;

SELECT department, COUNT(*) AS headcount, AVG(salary) AS avg_pay
FROM employees
GROUP BY department
HAVING COUNT(*) > 5
ORDER BY avg_pay DESC;

SELECT
    name,
    salary,
    RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY department ORDER BY salary DESC) AS salary_rank
FROM employees;

SELECT u.name
FROM users u
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM orders o
    WHERE o.user_id = u.id
    AND o.amount > 1000
);

INSERT INTO users (name, email)
VALUES ('Alice', 'alice@example.com');

INSERT INTO users (name, email)
VALUES ('Bob', 'bob@example.com')
ON CONFLICT (email)
DO UPDATE SET name = EXCLUDED.name;

CREATE INDEX idx_users_email ON users(email);
CREATE COMPOSITE INDEX idx_orders ON orders(user_id, created_at);

SELECT
    name,
    salary,
    LAG(salary) OVER (ORDER BY hire_date) AS prev_salary,
    LEAD(salary) OVER (ORDER BY hire_date) AS next_salary
FROM employees;

SELECT
    name,
    SUM(sales) OVER (PARTITION BY region ORDER BY month ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS running_total
FROM sales_data;

type NonNullable<T> = T extends null | undefined ? never : T;
type ReturnType<T extends (...args: any) => any> = T extends (...args: any) => infer R ? R : never;
